extraction_note: The available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) contain no documented information about music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, melodic character), sound chip specifications, composer details, or SFX characteristics for Descent (1995). The Wikipedia article focuses on gameplay mechanics, plot, development history, and reception, with no audio/music documentation. TCRF source was inaccessible for content extraction. To obtain this audio data would require consultation of game documentation, soundtrack liner notes, or audio analysis sources not provided.
